theme: Volume profile by 15-minute bucket throughout RTH
method: Average volume per 15m bar at each given open-time, across all RTH sessions in the sample.
sample_size_days: 232 (some buckets show fewer due to data alignment at the edges)
key_finding: Classic U-shape with the open dominant. The 9:30 bar is the peak (100%, ~37k contracts/15m). Volume falls steadily through midday, bottoming around 14:00 (~29% of peak). The closing 15-min bar (15:45-16:00) is the second-largest spike at 72% of peak — closing rotation/MOC activity. The 9:30 bar is ~3.5x the average midday bar.
